title: Silk TouchEX
description: Silk TouchEX allows Silk Touch tools to mine normally unbreakable or unobtainable blocks, expanding survival possibilities while staying balanced and vanilla-friendly.
body:
Silk Touch EX is a datapack that extends the Silk Touch enchantment.
With this datapack, some special blocks that normally break or cannot be obtained can now be mined when using a tool enchanted with Silk Touch. This makes it possible to collect and move blocks that are usually impossible to pick up in survival mode.

the blocks:
-Trial Spawner
-Suspicious Sand
-Suspicious Gravel
-Spawner
-Reinforced Deepslate
-Farmland
-Ender Chest
-Dirt Path
-Cake
-Budding Amethyst

You can join the Discord server if you have any questions or suggestions:https://discord.gg/X4WZepFGgF
